final:
module binary_counter (
	input clk,
	input reset,
	output reg [3:0] count);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

	if (reset) begin
		count <= 4'b0000;
	end else begin
		if (count == 4'b1111) begin
			count <= 4'b0000;
		end else begin
			count <= count + 1;
		end
	end
end

endmodule
